---
title: "Sunoj Shajahan"
---
<!-- Test sunoj's photo with this...  ![Sunoj Shajahan](./images/myphoto.jpg#right) {float: right} -->

![](./images/myphoto.jpg#right){width=30%}

## Postdoctoral associate 
Nutrient Management Spear Program, 
Department of Animal Science, 
Cornell University, Ithaca, NY 14853. 
Email: ss2678@cornell.edu
Connect me in 

## Education 
**Ph.D. Agricultural and Biosystems Engineering**
North Dakota State University (NDSU), Fargo, ND, USA 

**M.Tech., Agricultural Processing and Food Engineering**
Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU), Coimbatore, India

**B.Tech., Food Process Engineering**
Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU), Coimbatore, India

## Professional experiences
**Postdoctoral associate** 		Oct. 2019–Present
Department of Animal Science, Cornell University, Ithaca, NY, USA

**Graduate research assistant**	Aug. 2015–Oct. 2019
Department of Agricultural & Biosystems Engineering, NDSU, Fargo, ND, USA

**Teaching instructor**		Jan. 2015–May 2015
Ramakrishna Mission Vivekananda Educational & Research Institute, Coimbatore, India

**Graduate research fellow**	July 2012–May 2014
Department of Food & Agricultural Process Engineering, TNAU, Coimbatore, India

**Product development trainee**	Jan. 2014–Feb. 2014
Britannia Industries Private Limited, Chennai, India

**Quality assurance and product development trainee**	Nov. 2011–Feb. 2012
Perfetti Van Melle Private Limited, Chennai, India


## Technical skills
•	**Programming languages**: Java, JavaScript, Python, R, Dart, HTML, CSS. <br>
•	**UAV/Precision agriculture software**: Ag SMS, WebODM, Pix4D Mapper, DroneDeploy. <br>
•	**GIS/Remote sensing**: QGIS, Google Earth Engine, R, ArcGIS, ENVI. <br>
•	**Machine learning**: Scikit-learn (Python), caret (R). <br>
•	**Deep learning**: PyTorch (Python), TensorFlow (Python), Keras (R). <br>
•	**Mobile application**: Android Studio (Java), Flutter (Dart). <br>
•	**Robotics**: RaspberryPi (Pi 3B+), Arduino (Uno). <br>
•	**Document preparation**: LATEX, Microsoft Office. <br>
